enchantment.net_music_can_play_bili.head: Headphones
item.net_music_can_play_bili.mp4.tooltip: Right-click to enter the handheld focus UI prototype
Prototype: mouse input is unlocked; the UI will later be projected onto the item screen
tooltip.net_music_can_play_bili.pad.draf: Draft: editable map points and media IDs
tooltip.net_music_can_play_bili.pad.lock: Locked: browse and trigger playback only
tooltip.net_music_can_play_bili.pad.play: Triggered playback appears on the Pad landscape GUI; headphones/holographic glasses can link to it
message.net_music_can_play_bili.mp4.high: MP4 handheld video is decoding at %dx%d. Above 1080p has limited benefit at this handheld size and may increase decoder/GPU load.
message.net_music_can_play_bili.mp4.head: Unlinked %d headphone(s) from this MP4
message.net_music_can_play_bili.modern_t: This music CD needs an available resolver
block.net_music_can_play_bili.speaker: Speaker
item.net_music_can_play_bili.speaker: Speaker
gui.net_music_can_play_bili.speaker: Speaker Config
Stored link to (%d, %d, %d), place speaker to connect
message.net_music_can_play_bili.headphon: The helmet slot is occupied; with Curios installed, place headphones in a head accessory slot. Use the Media Management Tool to bind sources
Headphone binding moved to the Media Management Tool: open the tool and place the target and headphones in the UI
This turntable is already linked to speakers and cannot link headphones
MP4 headphone range exceeded; headphone link stopped
message.net_music_can_play_bili.holograp: Holographic glasses equipped: projector video is hidden, and linked media appears on the HUD hologram
The helmet slot is occupied; with Curios installed, place the glasses in a head accessory slot. Use the Media Management Tool to bind sources
Holographic glasses linked to MP4; its video will play on the HUD hologram while worn
Holographic glasses media screen binding added/updated (%d/%d)
Holographic glasses no longer bind directly to video projectors; bind a turntable or MP4 instead
This turntable is already linked to a video projector and cannot link holographic glasses
Holographic glasses can bind up to 4 media sources; unlink one first
Holographic binding moved to the Media Management Tool: open the tool and place the target and glasses in the UI; equip directly with an empty head slot
tooltip.net_music_can_play_bili.holograp: When worn, hides projector video locally; linked MP4/turntable media appears on a HUD hologram
message.net_music_can_play_bili.equipmen: Equip holographic glasses or headphones before clearing bindings
Cleared %d media binding(s) from the holographic glasses
The equipped holographic glasses have no media bindings to clear
Cleared %d audio binding(s) from the headphones
The equipped headphones have no audio bindings to clear
Cleared %d holographic media binding(s) and %d headphone audio binding(s) from the equipped item
The equipped item has no holographic or headphone bindings to clear
gui.net_music_can_play_bili.media_tool_r: Choose a nearby audible source to report to operators
Select an audio source to report
tooltip.net_music_can_play_bili.media_to: Right-click to bind; Shift-right-click to report nearby audio sources.
message.net_music_can_play_bili.media_to: Usage: right-click air or turntables with the media tool to open the confirmation UI. In air mode, place an MP4 on the left and gear on the upper-right, then click the arrow. Sneak-right-click reports sources.
Stored MP4 target %s…; right-click air again to open the binding confirmation UI
The media tool has no stored target
This target is not supported by the media tool yet
Put head gear with headphone or holographic ability in your offhand
Put head gear with holographic ability in your offhand
Place gear with headphone or holographic ability in the upper-right slot
Place gear with holographic ability in the upper-right slot
Place the MP4 to bind in the left slot
Place an MP4 in the left slot, or place gear to clear in the upper-right slot
Unlinked %d headphone(s) and %d holographic glasses from this target
This target is not linked to any headphones or holographic glasses
